title: Hwang In Youp And Hyeri Melt Into A Heartfelt Embrace In New Drama “Dream To You” Poster
content:
ENA’s upcoming drama “Dream to You” has unveiled a new poster! “Dream to You” is a romantic comedy about the reunion of genius film director Woo Soo Bin (Hwang In Youp), who returns after achieving his dreams, and reporter Joo Yi Jae (Hyeri), who has forgotten her own. 该剧为浪漫喜剧，讲述天才导演禹秀彬（黄寅烨饰）与记者朱伊在（惠利饰）重逢的故事
summary_zh: ENA新剧《Dream to You》公开了一张新海报，展现了黄寅烨与惠利深情拥抱的场景。该剧是一部浪漫喜剧，讲述天才导演禹秀彬（黄寅烨饰）实现梦想后回归，与忘记梦想的记者朱伊在（惠利饰）重逢的故事。

content:

On June 22, the new rom-com drama “See You at Work Tomorrow!” starring Seo In Guk and Park Ji Hyun premiered to No. 1 in ratings with an average nationwide viewership rating of 4.8 percent. title: BTS’s “I NEED U” (Original Ver.) MV Surpasses 200 Million Views
content:
Another BTS music video has reached 200 million views! The group’s “I NEED U” (Original ver.) music video surpassed 200 million views n June 23 at approximately 2:50 a.m. KST, which is about 11 years, one month, and 12 days since its release on May 11, 2025 at 12 a.m. KST.
